moments.title: England vs. Argentina World Cup Semi-Final
moments.blurb: England faces long-time rivals Argentina today in the highly anticipated FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final, with a spot in Sunday's final on the line.

angles.name: Pre-match hype
angles.copy: It's HERE. England vs. Argentina, World Cup semi-final. Who's making history today? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Big match build-up
angles.copy: The tension is building! England take on Argentina in the World Cup semi-final. Can the Three Lions roar into the final? Tune in!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final Approaches
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 Final is set for Sunday, July 19th, at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, with Spain already securing their place.

angles.name: Final countdown
angles.copy: Just days to go until the biggest game in football! The World Cup Final is this Sunday. Who do you want to see lift the trophy?

angles.name: Spain in the final
angles.copy: Spain are through to the World Cup Final after a dominant performance against France! Who will join them on Sunday?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, tees off tomorrow, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Golf major starts
angles.copy: Golf fans, get ready! The Open Championship begins tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale hosts
angles.copy: The iconic Royal Birkdale hosts The Open this week. Expect drama, incredible shots, and maybe a few surprises on the links!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Persists
moments.blurb: A prolonged heatwave continues across much of England and Wales, with temperatures expected to remain above 30°C in some areas into next week.

angles.name: Stay cool advice
angles.copy: Another scorcher today! The UK heatwave isn't going anywhere fast. Stay hydrated and find some shade out there!

angles.name: Heat health alert
angles.copy: Heat health alerts are in place across parts of England and Wales as the hot weather continues. Look after yourselves and check in on vulnerable neighbours.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival begins today in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, bringing four days of traditional and contemporary Celtic music to Scotland.

angles.name: Celtic music celebration
angles.copy: Stornoway is alive with music! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts today, celebrating the best of traditional and modern Celtic sounds. Who's going?

angles.name: Scottish festival vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for some incredible music and island vibes as the Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off in the Outer Hebrides!

moments.title: Richard Ashcroft at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Former The Verve frontman Richard Ashcroft plays a headline show at Cardiff Castle tomorrow, July 16th.

angles.name: Ashcroft in Cardiff
angles.copy: The one and only Richard Ashcroft takes to the stage at Cardiff Castle tomorrow! Who's excited to hear those iconic anthems?

angles.name: Verbe legend live
angles.copy: From 'Bitter Sweet Symphony' to solo hits, Richard Ashcroft live is always special. Catch him at Cardiff Castle tomorrow!

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival returns this weekend, July 18-19, to Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, promising a diverse lineup across five stages.

angles.name: Nottingham festival vibes
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is back this weekend! Nottingham's Wollaton Hall will be buzzing with live music, who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Weekend plans
angles.copy: Looking for weekend plans? Splendour Festival brings a huge lineup to Nottingham, kicking off Saturday!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary, takes place next week from July 23-26 at Henham Park, Suffolk, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Latitude countdown
angles.copy: Only a week to go until Latitude Festival! Suffolk's biggest party celebrates 20 years with David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi & more!

angles.name: Festival Lineup Buzz
angles.copy: From Talking Heads legend David Byrne to pop superstar Lewis Capaldi, Latitude Festival's 20th anniversary lineup is stacked! Who are you excited for?

moments.title: Happy 80th to Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Today, July 15th, marks the 80th birthday of legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her incredible vocal range and genre-spanning hits.

angles.name: Singing legend's birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 80th birthday to the iconic Linda Ronstadt! Her voice truly defined an era.

angles.name: Ronstadt's hits
angles.copy: From 'You're No Good' to 'Blue Bayou', Linda Ronstadt's incredible career turns 80 today! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 16th, marks the 74th birthday of Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer and co-founder of The Police.

angles.name: Police drummer's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday tomorrow to the incredible Stewart Copeland! The driving force behind The Police's iconic sound.

angles.name: Rhythm legend
angles.copy: The man behind the beat! Stewart Copeland, drumming legend of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday tomorrow. What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: On Sunday, July 19th, Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Queen guitarist bday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May this Sunday! A true rock legend and guitar hero.

angles.name: May's legacy
angles.copy: From Wembley to the world, Brian May's guitar riffs are unforgettable. Celebrating his 79th this weekend!

moments.title: M.I.A. Turns 51
moments.blurb: Influential artist and producer M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam) celebrates her 51st birthday on Saturday, July 18th.

angles.name: M.I.A. birthday
angles.copy: Paper Planes and groundbreaking beats! Happy 51st birthday to the incredible M.I.A. this Saturday!

angles.name: Dance icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the visionary M.I.A.'s 51st birthday this weekend! What's your favourite track from this genre-bending artist?

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: The Eagles co-founder and legendary drummer/vocalist, Don Henley, will celebrate his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' Don Henley next Wednesday! A voice and a talent that defined a generation.

angles.name: Hotel California icon
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', Don Henley's impact is undeniable. Celebrate his 79th birthday next week!

moments.title: Sammy Virji at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: DJ Sammy Virji brings his high-energy set to Cardiff Castle this Saturday, July 18th, for Shangri-La.

angles.name: Dance night in Cardiff
angles.copy: Cardiff Castle is about to get lively! Sammy Virji hits the decks this Saturday for a huge night of dance music. Who's ready?

angles.name: Welsh clubbing
angles.copy: This Saturday, Cardiff Castle transforms for Shangri-La with Sammy Virji! Get your tickets for a massive night out in the capital.

moments.title: The Wombats at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: The Wombats are set to headline 'Depot in the Castle' at Cardiff Castle on Saturday, July 25th, with special guests Sugababes.

angles.name: Indie in Cardiff
angles.copy: Get ready, Cardiff! The Wombats are headlining Depot in the Castle next Saturday, July 25th, with special guests Sugababes. Huge!

angles.name: Festival vibes
angles.copy: 'Let's Dance to Joy Division' and more! The Wombats and Sugababes are bringing the party to Cardiff Castle next weekend. Who's in?
